task_completion.description: Agent creates the Python script class_analysis.py
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the code for class_analysis.py being written or executed.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the generated HTML dashboard in Sugar's Browse activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sugar's Browse activity is open and displaying the local file class_dashboard.html.

task_completion.description: The HTML dashboard contains the correct tables, red highlighting, and correlation value
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered HTML shows a subject-by-quarter table, an at-risk students table highlighted in red (with 5 specific students), and a correlation coefficient of approximately 0.38.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a document in Sugar Write titled 'Q4 Progress Report'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sugar Write activity is open, and the title field at the top of the window is set to 'Q4 Progress Report'.

task_completion.description: The Write document contains the correct at-risk students table and summary statements
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Write document displays a table with the 5 at-risk students (Carlos Mendoza, Fatima Al-Rashid, Yuki Tanaka, Priya Sharma, Liam O'Brien), and text below the table stating that History is the lowest Q4 subject and the correlation is ~0.38.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the document as progress_report.odt in the Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal showing a copy/move command to /home/ga/Documents/progress_report.odt, or a file manager/save dialog confirming the file is saved in that exact location.

integrity.description: The agent uses a Python script to generate the HTML rather than writing the HTML manually
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal or editor shows Python code performing CSV parsing and HTML generation, and the script is executed.

integrity.description: The agent uses Sugar's Browse activity to view the HTML
integrity.visual_evidence: The HTML is viewed in the Browse browser interface, not just as source code in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent uses Sugar Write to create the report
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is being edited in the Sugar Write graphical interface, not just generated via a script or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: At-risk students (5 total): Carlos Mendoza, Fatima Al-Rashid, Yuki Tanaka, Priya Sharma, Liam O'Brien. Lowest Q4 average subject: History (74.04). Pearson correlation: 0.3809 (or ~0.38). The HTML at-risk table must be highlighted in red.
